creator: culot@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Junji,

thanks for submitting this update.
However, there are some files that are not properly cleaned after the
removal of the port as shown on the following tinderbox run log:

http://people.freebsd.org/~culot/tinderbox/7.4-FreeBSD/py27-amf-0.6.1.log

Could you please investigate the problem?

culot@
